headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 17, 2026**
article:
The Toronto Blue Jays secured a 2-1 victory over the Detroit Tigers, with Yohendrick Piñango leading the Blue Jays' offense with two home runs and one run driven in. The St. Louis Cardinals took down the Kansas City Royals 4-2, with Kyle Leahy earning the win after six innings of work. The Washington Nationals dominated the Baltimore Orioles, securing a 13-3 victory with Keibert Ruiz leading the Nationals' offense with a three-hit, five-RBI performance.

Several players have been placed on the injured list, including Ryan O'Hearn of the Pittsburgh Pirates, who has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right quad muscle strain. Other players on the injured list include Jose Trevino of the Cincinnati Reds, Tommy Nance of the Toronto Blue Jays, Jake Fraley of the Tampa Bay Rays, Heliot Ramos of the San Francisco Giants, Ben Joyce of the Los Angeles Angels, Trevor Story of the Boston Red Sox, and Clay Holmes of the New York Mets.

The Chicago White Sox have acquired center fielder Junior Perez from the Athletics in exchange for left-handed pitcher Jackson Nove. The Athletics have also traded right-hander Eduarniel Núñez to the Baltimore Orioles for cash and traded left-hander José Suarez to the Athletics for cash.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Edge Tigers in Thrilling 2-1 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays secured a narrow win over the Detroit Tigers, with a final score of 2-1. Yohendrick Piñango led the Blue Jays' offense with a strong performance, hitting 2 home runs and driving in 1 run.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Take Down Royals 4-2**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a 2-4 victory over the Kansas City Royals, with Kyle Leahy earning the win after 6.0 innings of work. Jac Caglianone led the Royals' offense with 2 hits, including a 5th home run of the season.

top_news.title: **Rockies Take Down Diamondbacks 4-2**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies secured a 2-4 victory over the Arizona Diamondbacks, with Tomoyuki Sugano earning the win and Antonio Senzatela securing the save. Mickey Moniak led the Diamondbacks' offense with 1 hit, 2 RBI, and 3 at-bats.

top_news.title: **Nationals Rout Orioles 13-3**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals dominated the Baltimore Orioles, securing a 13-3 victory. Keibert Ruiz led the Nationals' offense with a 3-hit, 5-RBI performance, including a home run.

top_news.title: **Pirates Place Ryan O'Hearn on 10-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Pittsburgh Pirates right fielder Ryan O'Hearn has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right quad muscle strain.

top_news.title: **White Sox Acquire Junior Perez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Chicago White Sox have acquired center fielder Junior Perez from the Athletics in exchange for left-handed pitcher Jackson Nove. This move adds depth to the White Sox outfield.
